name: @alcyone-labs/workalot
description: High-performance, multi-threaded job queue system for NodeJS/BunJS. Achieve high throughput jobs/sec with linear worker scaling.

scripts.benchmark: pnpm run build && bun run benchmarks/run-benchmarks.ts
scripts.benchmark:easy: pnpm run build && bun run benchmarks/run-benchmarks.ts --difficulty easy
scripts.benchmark:quick: pnpm run build && bun run benchmarks/run-benchmarks.ts --configs 2-cores-10k-jobs,4-cores-10k-jobs
scripts.benchmark:quick:easy: pnpm run build && bun run benchmarks/run-benchmarks.ts --configs 2-cores-10k-jobs,4-cores-10k-jobs --difficulty easy
scripts.benchmark:nodejs: pnpm run build && node dist/benchmarks/run-benchmarks.js --difficulty easy
scripts.benchmark:nodejs:quick: pnpm run build && node dist/benchmarks/run-benchmarks.js --configs 2-cores-10k-jobs,4-cores-10k-jobs --difficulty easy
scripts.example:quick-start: pnpm run build && bun run examples/quick-start.ts
scripts.example:performance: pnpm run build && bun run examples/performance-test.ts
scripts.example:errors: pnpm run build && bun run examples/error-handling.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build

author: Nicolas Embleton <nicolas.embleton@gmail.com>
